executive_summary: Build failure analysis for scib_demo repository on main branch (Attempt 3). The build failed due to GitHub Actions workflow configuration issues. The workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml) could not be found or accessed, resulting in a 404 Not Found error from the GitHub Actions API. This is a critical configuration error that prevents any build execution from occurring.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch endpoint returned a 404 Not Found error when attempting to trigger the build workflow. The workflow file at .github/workflows/build.yml is either missing, inaccessible, or GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The workflow file does not exist in the repository at the expected path (.github/workflows/build.yml), or the GitHub token lacks sufficient permissions to access/trigger workflows, or GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository.
errors.impact: Complete build failure - no build execution can occur until the workflow file is created or access permissions are corrected. This blocks all CI/CD automation for the repository.

errors.title: Missing Action URL in Build Logs
errors.description: The build failure logs do not contain a valid action_url, indicating that no GitHub Actions workflow run was successfully initiated. This prevents detailed log analysis and troubleshooting.
errors.error_message: action_url field is empty in build_failure_attempt-3.json. No workflow run was created.
errors.root_cause: Since the workflow dispatch failed with 404, no workflow run was created, and therefore no action URL could be generated.
errors.impact: Unable to access detailed build logs or workflow execution history. Prevents automated error analysis and remediation.

errors.title: Repeated Build Failure Across Multiple Attempts
errors.description: The same workflow configuration error has occurred across 3 consecutive build attempts (attempt-1, attempt-2, attempt-3), indicating a persistent configuration issue that requires manual intervention.
errors.error_message: Workflow file not found - Final attempt failure
errors.root_cause: The underlying workflow file issue has not been resolved between attempts, suggesting either the file was never created or there's a persistent permissions/access issue.
errors.impact: Continuous build failures prevent any code integration or deployment. Development workflow is completely blocked.

recommended_fixes.description: Create the missing .github/workflows/build.yml file in the repository with proper Maven build configuration.
steps: 1. Create .github/workflows directory if it doesn't exist
2. Create build.yml file with Maven build steps
4. Add Maven build command (mvn clean install)
5. Configure artifact upload for build outputs
6. Commit and push the workflow file
recommended_fixes.compliance_notes: Ensure workflow file follows organization's CI/CD standards and security policies. Review required approvals for workflow changes.

recommended_fixes.description: Verify that the GitHub token has sufficient permissions to trigger workflows and that GitHub Actions is enabled for the repository.
steps: 2. Ensure 'Allow all actions and reusable workflows' is enabled
4. Check organization-level Actions permissions if applicable
5. Verify repository is not archived or disabled
recommended_fixes.compliance_notes: Token permissions must comply with least-privilege principle. Document any permission changes in security audit log.

recommended_fixes.description: Add pre-dispatch validation to check if workflow file exists before attempting to trigger builds.
steps: 1. Add workflow file existence check in build trigger logic
2. Implement graceful error handling for missing workflows
3. Add logging for workflow validation failures
4. Return actionable error messages to users
recommended_fixes.compliance_notes: Validation logic should be auditable and logged for troubleshooting purposes.

compliance_audit_log.analysis_method: Automated error classification from build failure logs
compliance_audit_log.manual_review_reason: Critical configuration error requires verification of repository setup and permissions

next_steps: 1. IMMEDIATE: Create .github/workflows/build.yml file with Maven build configuration
2. IMMEDIATE: Verify GitHub Actions is enabled for the repository
3. HIGH PRIORITY: Verify GitHub token has workflow permissions
4. MEDIUM PRIORITY: Implement workflow file validation before dispatch
5. LOW PRIORITY: Add monitoring/alerting for workflow configuration issues
notes: This analysis is based on workflow dispatch errors only. No actual Maven build logs were available for analysis since the workflow could not be triggered. Once the workflow file is created and the build executes, a new analysis should be performed to identify any Maven-specific build errors (compilation, tests, dependencies, etc.).
